llm_pddl.notes: LLM+P is PDDL-domain oriented. The configured EduPlanBench bridge maps observations to symbolic learning-plan actions and returns EduPlanBench Action JSON.

lats.notes: LATS has HotPotQA/programming/WebShop entrypoints. The configured EduPlanBench bridge performs candidate expansion and rollout-style scoring over EduPlanBench actions.

plan_and_act.notes: Plan-and-Act is WebArena-oriented. The configured EduPlanBench bridge separates high-level planning and next-action execution over EduPlanBench observations.

reactree.notes: ReAcTree targets WAH/ALFRED and requires simulator setup. The configured EduPlanBench bridge maps observations to hierarchical sequence/fallback action nodes.

hiagent.notes: HiAgent depends on AgentBoard. The configured EduPlanBench bridge maintains a hierarchical working-memory summary and returns memory-conditioned actions.
